creator: baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Here is a patch that include: 
- a check on the Version of FreeBSD, if <60000 add a dependency on 
archivers/libarchive, don't if the version is enough, in fact it needs 
libarchive2 and I don't know which version is the first to get libarchive2
- correct a bug in CFLAGS+=

That should do the work, but need for testing on other OSVERSIONS than 7-BETA
(which is the only version I have to test)

Thanks,
Bapt
